name: Goldman Sachs MLP and Energy Renaissance Fund
summary: Goldman Sachs MLP and Energy Renaissance Fund is a closed-ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Goldman Sachs Asset Management, L.P. The fund invests in public equity markets of the United States. It seeks to invest in stocks of companies operating in the energy sector. The fund primarily invests in growth stocks of Master Limited Partnerships and related energy companies across all market capitalizations, with a focus on midstream MLP investments. It employs fundamental and quantitative analysis with a bottom-up stock selection approach to create its portfolio. The fund benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the Alerian MLP Index Total Return. Goldman Sachs MLP and Energy Renaissance Fund was formed on September 26, 2014 and is domiciled in the United States.
